caption: A person's hands are shown working on a handmade greeting card on a light-colored wooden surface. The card features a brown background with a light blue panel on the right and a white decorative tag overlapping the center. The tag reads "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer" in a mix of serif and script fonts. The left side of the card is adorned with silver-colored floral patterns. The person, wearing a metallic rose-gold watch, uses their fingers to position and press the light blue panel and the white tag onto the card base. As the sequence progresses, the person's right hand moves from the side of the card to the bottom edge of the blue panel, pressing it firmly into place. Several other pieces of blue and white cardstock are visible on the wooden surface around the main project.
